body_txt: They say Helen of Troy had a face that could launch a thousand ships; well, the Living MacGuffin has a similar ability to launch a thousand quests in search of them. She may be a heart wrenchingly beautiful princess whose hand can be won only with miraculous feats , a long lost (or left ) parent, sibling , close friend or Love Interest , some variation of The Chosen One who is needed for some greater purpose, or any number of typical MacGuffin functions. Either way, expect her to be female , because Men Act, Women Are . Sub-Tropes include:
